creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jim,

a quick search on the web shows that this is a problem with Hyperlatex and
Emacs 23.x in general (see [1], for example), and that other operating
systems are haveing the same problem. This has to be resolved with the
Emacs/Hyperlatex projects (probably the latter), not in the FreeBSD ports
tree, so I'll close this PR.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.mail-archive.com/hyperlatex-users@lists.sourceforge.net/msg00169.html
